subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! At this moment, while I commune with the spiritual messenger, a letter hath come from one of the beloved of God addressed to Jinab-i-Siyyid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی در ایندم که همدم پیک روحانیم نامه از یکی از احباالله بجناب سید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
